name: Digital Sound Level Meter
tagline: 30–130 dBA sound level meter with 1/2-inch condenser microphone, Fast/Slow response, Max hold and large backlit display.
description: The Vartech V 6700 B is an economical, high-quality digital sound level meter covering a wide 30–130 dBA measuring range. It features a 1/2-inch condenser microphone with A-weighting and a 5-digit backlit display with 0.1 dB resolution sampling at 2 times per second. The instrument provides Fast and Slow dynamic response modes, Maximum hold, and over/under range warning. Compact and easy to use, it is suited for workplace noise assessments, environmental noise surveys, HVAC testing and general-purpose acoustic measurement.
features: Auto Power Off — 9 V battery operation

specs.label: Accuracy
specs.value: ±1.5 dB  (subject to sound pressure reference 94 dB @ 1 kHz)

specs.label: Digital Display
specs.value: 5 digits  |  Resolution: 0.1 dB  |  Sampling rate: 2 times/s
